## How it was validated

<!--
Which checks did you run and what did you see? e.g.:
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` clean
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` clean (or residual findings noted below)
- [ ] `make e2e` green (if the change could affect the run path)
- [ ] new code covered by tests
-->

## Notes for reviewers

<!--
Anything reviewers should know: residual lint findings, follow-ups deliberately
left out, spec sections touched, or areas you're unsure about.
-->

---

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO).
- [ ] The spec's "Implementation status" block is updated if behavior/scope changed.
- [ ] I did not regress the security posture (see SECURITY.md / AGENTS.md §6).
